projectDescription: Pxxl is an Africa-first cloud deployment platform that lets developers ship websites, APIs, databases, and custom domains from GitHub to a live URL without manual server configuration.
keyFeatures: Git-based deployments from GitHub — push code to get a live URL
Framework auto-detection for Node.js, Python, Go, PHP, Ruby, Java, .NET, Rust, and more
Custom domain management with DNS, SSL, subdomains, and nameserver controls
Managed databases — PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB
CDN object storage with public and private spaces
Edge proxy with DDoS protection, WAF rules, rate limiting, and geo-blocking
Pull request preview deployments with automatic 72-hour expiry
OAuth integrations for building third-party apps on top of Pxxl accounts
Signed webhooks for deployment, project, and OAuth lifecycle events
Cron job scheduler for recurring HTTP tasks
Import projects from Vercel, Netlify, Render, and Railway
Scoped API keys for backend automation and CDN workflows
publicApiSurface: OAuth scopes: profile, email, github, key

Webhook events: project.created, project.updated, project.deleted, deployment.created, deployment.status_changed, environment.updated, user.profile_updated, oauth.authorized, oauth.denied, oauth.revoked
